# Ashoklabs

> {{ site.description }}

Written by {{ site.author.name }} — {{ site.author.title }}. {{ site.author.bio }}

This site contains a technical engineering blog and a paid online course on platform engineering. All blog content is free. Course lessons are gated behind a purchase.

## Blog Posts
{% for post in site.posts %}
- [{{ post.title }}]({{ site.url }}{{ post.url }}): {{ post.description }}
{% endfor %}

## Courses

- [Platform Engineering Bootcamp]({{ site.url }}/courses/platform-engineering/): Hands-on bootcamp covering Linux internals, networking, Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, CI/CD, and observability. Aimed at DevOps engineers moving into platform roles.

### Platform Engineering Bootcamp — Lessons
- [Engineering Foundations]({{ site.url }}/courses/platform-engineering/lessons/01-engineering-foundations/): Linux internals, DNS resolution, HTTP lifecycle, and production Git workflows. 45 min.
- [Application Platform]({{ site.url }}/courses/platform-engineering/lessons/02-application-platform/): Microservices, API services, async workers, databases, and how platforms host them reliably. 50 min.

## Newsletter

- [Newsletter]({{ site.url }}/newsletter): Weekly posts on DevOps, platform engineering, and building reliable infrastructure. Hosted on Beehiiv.

## About

- Author: {{ site.author.name }}, {{ site.author.title }}

- Site: {{ site.url }}
